title: March 31
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|March}}

'''March 31''' is the 90th day of the year (91st in leap years), with 275 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1910s#1916|1916]] – [[Lucille Bliss]] is born.
*[[1940s#1945|1945]] – [[Edwin Catmull]] is born.
*[[1950s#1958|1958]] – [[Tony Cox]] is born.
*[[1959]] - [[Nick Gillard]]
*[[1971]] – [[Ewan McGregor]] is born.
*1971 – [[Mark Newbold]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Andrew Bowen]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Daniel Mays]] is born.
*[[1995]] – ''[[Star Wars Technical Journal]]'' published in UK.
*[[1997]] – ''[[Planet of Twilight]]'' published.
*[[1999]] – ''[[Classic Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... 1]]'' published.
*1999 – [[Star Wars Manga: The Empire Strikes Back 3|''Star Wars Manga: The Empire Strikes Back'' 3]] published.
*[[2002]] – [[Marvin Goldhar]] dies.
*[[2004]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 14]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*2004 – [[Star Wars Infinities: Return of the Jedi 4|''Star Wars Infinities: Return of the Jedi'' 4]] published.
*[[2005]] – "[[Everyone's a Critic (article)|Everyone's a Critic]]" article published on [[Wizards of the Coast]] website.
*2005 – ''[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith: The Movie Storybook]]'' published.
*[[2010]] – [[Legacy (2006) 46|''Legacy'' (2006) 46]] published.
*[[2014]] – [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (video game)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures'']] closes.
*[[2015]] – [[A New Dawn (novel)|''A New Dawn'']] paperback published.
*[[2020]] – [[Andrew Jack]] dies.
*2020 – [[Star Wars: Episode IX The Rise of Skywalker|''Star Wars'': Episode IX ''The Rise of Skywalker'']] releases on home media.
*2020 – ''[[The Art of Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker]]'' published.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars Unfolds: The Original Trilogy]]'' published.
*[[2021]] – [[Star Wars Insider 201|''Star Wars Insider'' 201]] published.
*[[2025]] – [[Patty Maloney]] dies.
*[[2026]] – ''[[Star Wars: Legacy of Vader – The Reign of Kylo Ren Vol. 2]]'' to be published.
<noinclude>
